name: Kielbasa and Bow Tie Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Smoked kielbasa, cut into 1/4" pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausage until lightly browned.
2. Add the chicken broth and canned pasta-ready tomatoes (with their juice) to the pan.
3. Cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Uncover, add the bow tie pasta, and cook until al dente, about 8-9 minutes.
5. Spoon the soup into bowls and sprinkle with minced parsley.
